meta.title: Renta de Velero
meta.description: Renta un velero privado en La Paz, BCS. Navega el Mar de Cortes con capitan, snorkel, kayaks y comida gourmet. Tours romanticos y de aventura disponibles.

hero.title: Renta de Velero Privado
hero.description: Navega por el Mar de Cortes en un velero completamente equipado. Perfecto para aventuras romanticas, celebraciones especiales o simplemente disfrutar del mar.
hero.image_alt: Renta de Velero en La Paz

about.title: Sobre la Experiencia
about.description_1: Experimenta la libertad del mar a bordo de un velero privado completamente equipado con bano, cocina, camarote, chimenea y todas las comodidades para tu aventura.
about.description_2: Navega hacia destinos iconicos como Playa Balandra, Isla Espiritu Santo o simplemente disfruta de un atardecer romantico en el Mar de Cortes. Cada experiencia incluye capitan profesional, equipo de snorkel, kayaks, paddle boards y todas las amenidades necesarias para un dia perfecto en el mar.
about.description_3: Ya sea que busques una experiencia romantica con brunch gourmet, un dia completo de aventura acuatica, o simplemente relajarte mientras navegas, tenemos el paquete perfecto para ti.

pricing.title: Opciones de Tours
pricing.subtitle: Elige el paquete que mejor se adapte a tu aventura

premium.subtitle: Velero 40 pies con todas las amenidades

Equipo de snorkel, kayak, paddle boards

san_rafaelito.subtitle: Avistamiento de lobos marinos

Tabla de quesos y carnes frias
sunset.ideal_for: Perfecto para: Aniversarios, propuestas, celebraciones especiales

includes.title: Que Esta Incluido
includes.subtitle: Todas nuestras experiencias en velero incluyen las comodidades esenciales para tu aventura

schedules.title: Horarios recomendados
schedules.text: Para tours de dia completo, recomendamos salida entre 9:00-10:00 AM. Para atardeceres, salida 2-3 horas antes del sunset.

weather.title: Condiciones climaticas
weather.text: Los tours estan sujetos a condiciones climaticas. En caso de mal tiempo, se reprogramara sin costo adicional.

customization.title: Personalizacion
customization.text: Quieres personalizar tu experiencia? Podemos organizar catering especial, decoracion para ocasiones especiales, sesion fotografica profesional y mas. Contactanos para detalles.

cta.title: Listo para Zarpar?
cta.description: Reserva tu velero privado y vive una experiencia inolvidable en el Mar de Cortes
cta.note: Preguntas? Escribenos por WhatsApp o email. Respondemos en menos de 24 horas.

meta.title: Sailboat Rental
meta.description: Rent a private sailboat in La Paz, BCS. Sail the Sea of Cortez with a captain, snorkel, kayaks and gourmet food. Romantic and adventure tours available.

hero.title: Private Sailboat Rental
hero.description: Sail through the Sea of Cortez on a fully equipped sailboat. Perfect for romantic adventures, special celebrations or simply enjoying the sea.

about.title: About the Experience
about.description_1: Experience the freedom of the sea aboard a fully equipped private sailboat with bathroom, kitchen, cabin, fireplace and all the comforts for your adventure.
about.description_2: Sail to iconic destinations like Playa Balandra, Espiritu Santo Island or simply enjoy a romantic sunset on the Sea of Cortez. Each experience includes a professional captain, snorkel gear, kayaks, paddle boards and all the amenities for a perfect day at sea.
about.description_3: Whether you are looking for a romantic experience with gourmet brunch, a full day of aquatic adventure, or simply relaxing while sailing, we have the perfect package for you.

pricing.title: Tour Options
pricing.subtitle: Choose the package that best suits your adventure

premium.name: Premium Private Tour
premium.subtitle: 40-foot sailboat with all amenities
features: 24-pack of beer, water and soft drinks
premium.destinations: Destinations: Playa Balandra, El Merito, El Zorrillo or Espiritu Santo Island

san_rafaelito.name: San Rafaelito to Balandra
san_rafaelito.subtitle: Sea lion watching
features: Use of kayaks and paddle boards
san_rafaelito.ideal_for: Ideal for: Marine life and nature lovers

sunset.name: Sunset on the Malecon
sunset.subtitle: Romantic experience for 2
features: 4 hours on the malecon and bay
sunset.ideal_for: Perfect for: Anniversaries, proposals, special celebrations

brunch.name: Romantic Brunch on a Sailboat
brunch.subtitle: Gourmet experience for couples
features: Gourmet cheese and cold cuts board
Mimosas (sparkling white wine with orange juice)
brunch.ideal_for: Ideal for: Anniversaries, birthdays, special occasions

includes.title: What's Included
includes.subtitle: All our sailboat experiences include the essential comforts for your adventure

schedules.title: Recommended schedules
schedules.text: For full-day tours, we recommend departure between 9:00-10:00 AM. For sunsets, departure 2-3 hours before sunset.

weather.title: Weather conditions
weather.text: Tours are subject to weather conditions. In case of bad weather, it will be rescheduled at no additional cost.

customization.title: Customization
customization.text: Want to customize your experience? We can arrange special catering, decoration for special occasions, professional photo session and more. Contact us for details.

cta.title: Ready to Set Sail?
cta.description: Book your private sailboat and enjoy an unforgettable experience in the Sea of Cortez
cta.note: Questions? Write to us on WhatsApp or email. We respond in less than 24 hours.

meta.title: Location de Voilier
meta.description: Louez un voilier prive a La Paz, BCS. Naviguez sur la mer de Cortez avec capitaine, snorkeling, kayaks et cuisine gastronomique. Tours romantiques et d'aventure disponibles.

hero.title: Location de Voilier Prive
hero.description: Naviguez sur la mer de Cortez a bord d'un voilier entierement equipe. Parfait pour les aventures romantiques, les celebrations speciales ou simplement profiter de la mer.
hero.image_alt: Location de Voilier a La Paz

about.title: A propos de l'Experience
about.description_1: Vivez la liberte de la mer a bord d'un voilier prive entierement equipe avec salle de bain, cuisine, cabine, cheminee et tout le confort pour votre aventure.
about.description_2: Naviguez vers des destinations iconiques comme Playa Balandra, l'ile Espiritu Santo ou profitez simplement d'un coucher de soleil romantique sur la mer de Cortez. Chaque experience inclut un capitaine professionnel, equipement de snorkeling, kayaks, paddle boards et toutes les commodites pour une journee parfaite en mer.
about.description_3: Que vous cherchiez une experience romantique avec brunch gastronomique, une journee complete d'aventure aquatique, ou simplement vous detendre en naviguant, nous avons le forfait parfait pour vous.

pricing.title: Options de Tours
pricing.subtitle: Choisissez le forfait qui convient le mieux a votre aventure

schedules.title: Horaires recommandes
schedules.text: Pour les tours de journee complete, nous recommandons un depart entre 9h00 et 10h00. Pour les couchers de soleil, depart 2-3 heures avant le sunset.

weather.title: Conditions meteorologiques
weather.text: Les tours sont soumis aux conditions meteorologiques. En cas de mauvais temps, il sera reprogramme sans frais supplementaires.

customization.title: Personnalisation
customization.text: Vous souhaitez personnaliser votre experience ? Nous pouvons organiser un traiteur special, une decoration pour occasions speciales, une seance photo professionnelle et plus encore. Contactez-nous pour les details.

cta.note: Des questions ? Ecrivez-nous sur WhatsApp ou par email. Nous repondons en moins de 24 heures.

meta.title: 帆船租赁
meta.description: 在 La Paz, BCS 租一艘私人帆船。与船长一起航行科尔特斯海，浮潜、皮划艇和美食。提供浪漫和冒险之旅。

hero.title: 私人帆船租赁
hero.description: 乘坐设施齐全的帆船航行科尔特斯海。非常适合浪漫冒险、特殊庆典或单纯享受大海。

about.title: 关于体验
about.description_1: 登上一艘设施齐全的私人帆船，体验海上自由，配备浴室、厨房、卧舱、壁炉以及冒险所需的一切便利设施。
about.description_2: 航向 Playa Balandra、Espiritu Santo 岛等标志性目的地，或在科尔特斯海上享受浪漫日落。每次体验都包含专业船长、浮潜装备、皮划艇、桨板以及海上完美一天所需的所有设施。
about.description_3: 无论您是寻找带有美食早午餐的浪漫体验、全天的水上冒险，还是边航行边放松，我们都有适合您的完美套餐。

pricing.title: 旅游选项
pricing.subtitle: 选择最适合您冒险的套餐

schedules.title: 推荐时间
schedules.text: 全天行程建议上午 9:00-10:00 出发。日落行程建议在日落前 2-3 小时出发。

weather.title: 天气条件
weather.text: 行程取决于天气条件。如遇恶劣天气，将免费改期。

customization.title: 个性化定制
customization.text: 想要定制您的体验？我们可以安排特别餐饮、特殊场合装饰、专业摄影等。联系我们了解详情。

cta.title: 准备好起航了吗？
cta.description: 预订您的私人帆船，在科尔特斯海享受难忘的体验
cta.note: 有问题？通过 WhatsApp 或邮件联系我们。我们在 24 小时内回复。
